title: Link example mentioned in the README
author: NetOpWibby
body: I had to log into Twitter and paste the URL of this repo to find what you were talking about: https://twitter.com/trpfsu/status/1910446844762636658

title: Android Compatibility ✅
author: kagantemizkan
body:
Hi, saw your post on X and i just wanted to let you know that I tested the overlay on Android, and it’s working great!
No issues so far — smooth animations and everything looks good.

Feel free to update the README to reflect Android support if you’d like. Awesome work! 🚀
